# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is the online course book for **SLAT7855 – Statistics for Linguists**. It introduces quantitative research methods, statistics, and data analysis with R for students of linguistics and applied linguistics.

Each chapter corresponds to one session of the course and combines conceptual explanations, worked examples with R code, key-concept boxes, and self-check exercises.

::: {.callout-note}
## How to use this book

- **Code blocks** can be copied with the clipboard button in their top-right corner.
- **Key concept** boxes summarize the ideas you should be able to explain in your own words.
- **Exercises** at the end of each chapter let you check your understanding immediately - answers are checked in your browser, and nothing is recorded.
:::
